intent: No-motion pendant caller that proves the TSKSTATUS register contract for A_FLEXI_LOADER.

safety.notes: This program calls TSKSTATUS only. It does not run, pause, abort, resume, select, or move any program.

verification.notes: After running from the pendant, verify R[91] and the KAREL user output. Expected inactive result is R[91]=204 for an aborted task instance or R[91]=404 when no task instance is found.
